commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 6:17 Now then, O LORD God of Israel, let your word be verified, which you have spoken unto your servant David. Douay Rheims 1609 And when his heart had taken courage (a) for the ways of our Lord, he took away also the Excesses and groves out of Juda. (a) Good, works approved by new benefits from God, as a reward, thereof do give more hope & confidence to proceed from virtue to virtue. de regimine Regum.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
